scripts.test: newman run collections/FakeStoreAPI.postman_collection.json -e environments/FakeStore-Dev.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-json-export reports/report.json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Fake Store API Test Report"; node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const date = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-'); if (fs.existsSync('reports/report.html')) fs.copyFileSync('reports/report.html', 'reports/report-' + date + '.html')"; npm run report
